title: Core Mechanics Development
desc: Setting up basic VR grab mechanics, hand colliders, and throwing physics.

title: VR Locomotion & Comfort Configurations
desc: Implementing comfortable teleportation controls and field-of-view comfort screens.

title: Trash Disposal Systems
desc: Creating trash bins and bag systems that process, delete, and score thrown clutter.

title: First Playable Room (Bedroom)
desc: Assembling a small greybox bedroom to test interactive item scaling in VR.

title: Player Equipment Belt Sockets
desc: Rigging a virtual utility belt to store player sponges, rollers, and tool assets.

title: Interactive Menu Tablet
desc: Creating an elegant wearable computer wrist-watch showing current progress.

title: Interactive Level 1 Construction
desc: Building a realistic 4-room house layout (Kitchen, Living Room, Bedroom, Bathroom).

title: Wall Cleaning & Sponge Scrubbing System
desc: Enabling physical sponge wipes to erase grimy stains and mold from walls in real-time.

title: Structural Repair Systems (Hammer tool)
desc: Developing mechanics to repair broken chair legs and cabinets by hammering them.

title: Wall Painting Mechanics
desc: Implementing paint rollers that change wall colors dynamically with clean brushstrokes.

title: Furnishing & Decoration catalogs
desc: Creating placement holograms to purchase and position sofas, lamps, and plants.

title: Progression & Cash Reward Managers
desc: Implementing career contract progression, tracking levels cleared, and assigning cash.

title: Interactive Shop System
desc: Building an office laptop menu to buy upgraded sponges, rollers, and tool sizes.

title: Level 2 Assembly (Medium 2-Story House)
desc: Building a suburban house featuring multiple floors and advanced large clutter.

title: Level 3 Assembly (Large Hoarder Estate)
desc: Assembling a severely neglected estate with complex hazardous materials to clear.

title: Multiplayer Co-Op Core Mechanics
desc: Enabling multiplayer rooms where developers/players clean homes in co-op.

title: Co-Op Progress Sync Manager
desc: Networking paint, repairs, and trash disposal so actions sync perfectly across players.

title: Sound Effects & Atmospheric Music
desc: Adding scrubbing sounds, trash rustling, cash registry rings, and cozy clean up tunes.

title: VR Haptic Vibrations
desc: Programming soft controller vibration rumbles on cleaning and heavy kicks on hammer strikes.

title: Contract Challenges Mode
desc: Implementing optional timed challenges with bonus payouts and performance stars.

title: Quest Standalone Performance Profiles
desc: Polishing frame rendering to ensure butter-smooth gameplay on Quest 2 and 3.

title: Collision & Physics Thread Optimization
desc: Optimizing code execution to prevent lag when massive amounts of trash are shifted.

title: Quality Assurance & Bug Sweeping
desc: Performing intensive playtesting to clean bugs and resolve locomotion edge-cases.

title: VR Comfort Configurations
desc: Setting up user configuration settings for left-handed controls, vignettes, and smooth turns.

title: Final Build Deployment & Delivery
desc: Packaging optimized Quest builds (.apk) and compiling complete delivery source codes.
